items.name: Itoen Nama Apple Tea
items.merchantDescription: Itoen is one of Japan's prime tea makers. Here is a tea that is made to taste like fresh apples, and is not overbaringly sweet like typical juice, serving that perfect balance. Contains 500ml.

items.name: Seven Dashi Furikake

items.merchantDescription: Ippudo is a famous Japanese ramen restaurant chain with locations worldwide. This is their unique spicy sauce which is excellent went put on top of bean sprouts, or moyashi.

items.name: Salad Duo Goma Wasabi Dressing
items.merchantDescription: Goma means sesame in Japanese. This is a dressing mixing the aroma of Japanese sesame and wasabi, which serves really great with salads and different dishes.

items.name: Jounetsu Kakaku Yakiniku Sauce
items.merchantDescription: This is a sweet sauce that goes perfect with grilled meat which comes in a big size.

items.name: Pokka Sapporo Soup: Pumpkin Cream

items.name: Knorr Soup Pack: Vegetable Champon
items.merchantDescription: Knorr soup is famous because it's so easy to make. Just pour hot water into a cup, and let it sit for a few minutes, and you're set. Comes with 4 servings. Champon is a noodle dish originated from Nagasaki, Japan. This soup features a vegetable champon flavor.

items.name: Knorr Soup Pack: Seafood Jjigae
items.merchantDescription: Knorr soup is famous because it's so easy to make. Just pour hot water into a cup, and let it sit for a few minutes, and you're set. Comes with 4 servings. Jjigae is a korean dish similar to Western stew. This is a seafood jjigae flavored soup, which will give

items.name: Kewpie Spaghetti Sauce: Japanese Mushroom
items.merchantDescription: Kewpie is a famous Japanese maker of mayo, salad dressings, and other seasonings! This is a butter shoyu flavored mushroom sauce for pasta of your choice. Comes with 2 servings.

items.name: Yoshinoya Togarashi Peppers
items.merchantDescription: Yoshinoya is one of the most famous multinational Gyudon (Beef Rice) restaurant chains around the world. This is their unique togarashi, a kind of Japanese chili pepper. 30 g

items.name: Pokka Sapporo Lemon Sauce
items.merchantDescription: In Japan, dipping beef with lemon juice is very common and popular cause it enirches the flavor of the grilled beef itself. Try it out!

items.name: Nagatanien Tendon Furikake
items.merchantDescription: Tendon means Tempura over rice in Japan. This furikake delivers the tendon, or tempura rice bowl, flavor to your home, and all you have to do is to sprinkle some of this furikake on your bowl of rice.

items.name: Nagatanien Gyudon Furikake
items.merchantDescription: Gyudon means stewed beef over rice in Japan. This furikake delivers the Gyudon flavor to your home, and all you have to do is to sprinkle some of this furikake on your bowl of rice.

items.name: Nagatanien Super Yakiniku Furikake

items.merchantDescription: Nobel is here with a new tapioca/boba hard candy. The hard candy shell is flavored like kuromitsu (brown sugar) and matcha au lait, while the inside contains a tapioca gummy. Yummy!

items.merchantDescription: Sumikko Gurashi is here with their own chocolate DIY that you can easily make at home! It comes with biscuits which you can turn into popsickle sticks for a fun candy experience. For instructions please watch this video:

items.name: Pocky Couple De Fruits (Framboise And Pistachio)
